channel.title: Game Changer Animated
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer Animated on Dropout.tv

item.title: Brennan's "Yes Or No?" Monologue
item.description:
Brennan figures out the rule to Sam's game. Animated by Trevor Dedekind and Cassie Robinson.

Duration: 02:15

Tags: Game Changer Animated, Game Changer, animation, game shows, challenges, competitions, improv, surprises, mad skills, unscripted, sam reich, brennan lee mulligan, ally beardsley, zac oyama, yukfoo animation, trevor dedekind, cassie robinson
